lock.title: Vault Locked
lock.subtitle: Your vault has been locked. Enter your master password to unlock.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Set up your zero-knowledge vault
register.processingSubtitle: Generating encryption keys. This may take a few seconds.

recoveryKit.title: Recovery Kit
recoveryKit.intro: Save this recovery key somewhere safe and private. With it you can reset your master password and keep all your vault data. It will not be shown again.
recoveryKit.warning: If you lose this key <1>and</1> forget your master password, your vault is gone for good. vaultctl is zero-knowledge - no one, not even an administrator, can recover it. There is no other way back in.
recoveryKit.confirm: I have safely stored my recovery key

recovery.title: Recover your vault
recovery.subtitle: Use your recovery key to set a new master password. Your vault data is preserved.
recovery.noKitTitle: No recovery kit on file for this account.
recovery.noKitHintIntro: Your master password can't be reset without a recovery kit, but here's the hint you saved:
recovery.noKitHintFollowup: If that jogs your memory, head back and sign in. Once you're in, create a recovery kit from Settings so this can't happen again.
recovery.noKitNoHint: vaultctl is zero-knowledge: without your master password or a recovery kit, the vault cannot be decrypted - not by you, not by an administrator. If your instance has an administrator, contact them. Once you can sign in, create a recovery kit from Settings so this can't happen again.

errors.passwordTooShort: New password must be at least 10 characters
errors.invalidKey: That doesn't look like a valid recovery key
errors.incorrectKey: Incorrect recovery key for this account

errors.accountLocked: Account locked due to too many failed attempts
errors.bioMasterChanged: Master password changed - sign in once to re-enable Touch ID
errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 10 characters
errors.emailExists: An account with this email already exists
errors.weakPassword: Password is too weak - try a longer passphrase
